zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Bradshaw於1455年1月1日出生在英國藍卡爾博爾頓時，她的父親John Bradshaw40歲，母親Ellen De Hulton33歲。她和Alan de Hulton至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1502年1月1日在她的家鄉享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Bradshaw于1455年1月1日出生在英国藍卡爾博爾頓时，她的父亲John Bradshaw40岁，母亲Ellen De Hulton33岁。她和Alan de Hulton至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1502年1月1日在她的家乡享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bradshaw
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Bradshaw in Lancashire, Yorkshire, and Derbyshire, from Old English brād ‘broad’ + sceaga ‘thicket’.

variants.name: Brayshaw
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of   Bradshaw  , reflecting the local Yorkshire pronunciation.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Bradshaw was born on 1 January 1455, in Bolton, Lancashire, England, her father, John Bradshaw, was 40 and her mother, Ellen De Hulton, was 33. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Alan de Hulton. She died on 1 January 1502, in her hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Bradshaw est née le 1 janvier 1455, à Bolton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, John Bradshaw, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Ellen De Hulton, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Alan de Hulton. Elle est décédée le 1 janvier 1502, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Bradshaw am 1. Januar 1455 in Bolton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Bradshaw 40 und ihre Mutter Ellen De Hulton 33. Sie hatte mit Alan de Hulton mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Januar 1502 im Alter von 47 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bradshaw è nata il il 1 gennaio 1455 nel Bolton, Lancashire, England, sua padre, John Bradshaw, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Ellen De Hulton, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Alan de Hulton. Morì il 1 gennaio 1502, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bradshaw(이)가 1455년 1월 1일 영국 랭카실르 볼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bradshaw(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen De Hulton(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Alan de Hulton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1502년 1월 1일 그녀의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bradshaw nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1455, em Bolton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Bradshaw, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Ellen De Hulton, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Alan de Hulton. Ela faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1502, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Bradshaw родилась 1 января 1455 г. в местности болтон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Bradshaw было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen De Hulton, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Alan de Hulton. Она умерла 1 января 1502 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Alan de Hulton. Murió el 1 de enero de 1502, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años.
